notes: AKB-13 r5: ONE voice only — Liam (VCgLBmBjldJmfphyB8sZ) throughout. No Alice. 3 pairs filled (France/Paris, Japan/Tokyo, Germany/Berlin). Adds Settings step (s11), Preview participant-view steps (s12-s14), back-to-editor (s15), present (s16). Video = 67s trimmed + 23s freeze = 90s total.

steps.display_text: A Match Pairs slide challenges participants to drag prompts to their correct answers — great for vocabulary, capitals, and more. Keep each item short and unambiguous so every prompt has exactly one clear match.
steps.tts_text: A Match Pairs slide challenges participants to drag prompts to their correct answers — great for vocabulary, capitals, and more. Keep each item short and unambiguous so every prompt has exactly one clear match.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Match Pairs from the Quiz section of the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Match Pairs from the Quiz section of the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your matching challenge in the Your question field. This appears at the top so participants know what to connect.
steps.tts_text: Type your matching challenge in the Your question field. This appears at the top so participants know what to connect.

steps.display_text: Enter the first prompt. Aim for three to four pairs — enough to engage without crowding a mobile screen.
steps.tts_text: Enter the first prompt. Aim for three to four pairs — enough to engage without crowding a mobile screen.

steps.display_text: Now type the matching answer. The answer column shuffles automatically so participants cannot copy the order.
steps.tts_text: Now type the matching answer. The answer column shuffles automatically so participants cannot copy the order.

steps.display_text: Add a second prompt. Use parallel structure — if the left column uses country names, keep that format for all prompts.
steps.tts_text: Add a second prompt. Use parallel structure — if the left column uses country names, keep that format for all prompts.

steps.display_text: Add a third pair to make the game challenging. Watch the canvas update in real time as each pair appears.
steps.tts_text: Add a third pair to make the game challenging. Watch the canvas update in real time as each pair appears.

steps.display_text: Type the third answer. Three complete pairs are now showing.
steps.tts_text: Type the third answer. Three complete pairs are now showing.

steps.display_text: Click the Settings gear to set the time limit and point value. Shorter time limits add urgency; higher points reward accuracy.
steps.tts_text: Click the Settings gear to set the time limit and point value. Shorter time limits add urgency; higher points reward accuracy.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to see both the presenter screen and the participant's phone side by side.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to see both the presenter screen and the participant's phone side by side.

steps.display_text: Participants scan the code or visit the link to join. They enter a name and tap Join the game — then wait for the host to start.
steps.tts_text: Participants scan the code or visit the link to join. They enter a name and tap Join the game — then wait for the host to start.

steps.display_text: Once the host starts the round, each participant's screen shows the prompts and shuffled answers. They match each answer to its prompt before time runs out.
steps.tts_text: Once the host starts the round, each participant's screen shows the prompts and shuffled answers. They match each answer to its prompt before time runs out.

steps.display_text: Your three pairs are set up and the experience is ready for participants.
steps.tts_text: Your three pairs are set up and the experience is ready for participants.

steps.display_text: Click Present to launch the live session. Your participants will race to match every pair before the timer runs out.
steps.tts_text: Click Present to launch the live session. Your participants will race to match every pair before the timer runs out.
